MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Hall, Esq., (415-512-9865), for Quan He, Plaintiff.
Natasha Smith, Defendant in pro per, (510-200-2412).

Defendant came in at 10:40am for trial call. Court and parties meet and confer re the case. Off the record, Court strikes the defendant's demand for Jury Trial. Per ruling of the Court, this case is now converted to Court Trial. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Line 2

Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501/502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Quan He is present.
Attorney Michael C Hall, Esq. (415-512-9865), counsel for the plaintiff is present.
No Appearance by defendant Natasha Smith.

The settlement conference does not take place and is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-17-2014 remains on calendar.
